text:
EVER JAZZ is a cover album by All That Jazz (Tomoo Nogami) consisting of musics featured in the Evangelion franchise with jazz arrangements. https://musicbrainz.org/release/27a09650-7606-4fb8-b5ac-efa9d80eded6 It was published by Banana Music Publishing via the SREVOC Records label on 03 October 2012 with catalog number SRVC-1043. https://www.billboard-japan.com/goods/detail/358436
